codeReview.summary: The worker stub commit satisfies the milestone behavior: POST /health returns 200, POST /execute-run returns the shared 501 stub response regardless of body validity, unmatched routes return 404, the shared request schema is imported, and both Vitest coverage and wrangler dev HTTP verification align with the required route matrix. No code review issues were identified in the reviewed commit.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The cf-worker skill should explicitly warn that module workers may only export the default worker object and Durable Object classes; exporting extra named constants caused wrangler startup issues during this stub implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-stub handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges[0] calls out wrangler startup failures from extra exports; the final apps/browser-executor/src/index.ts keeps only the default worker export, BrowserLeaseDO, and internal helpers.
